channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Stock futures fall as global chip sell-off continues: Live updates
item.description: The moves come after a decline in chipmakers dragged the broader market lower and the U.S. continued to strike Iran overnight.

item.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
item.description: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

item.title: BP, ConocoPhillips to back Iraq with major investments as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
item.description: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

item.title: World’s largest olive oil producer gives upbeat outlook after historic industry crisis
item.description: Spain's Deoleo, the world's largest olive oil producer, says the industry is gradually recovering from one of the most challenging moments in its history.

item.title: Trump doubles down on 2020 election claims in national address, alleging China meddling
item.description: Trump also repeated his calls for the Republican-led Congress to pass the "SAVE America Act," a controversial election bill that lacks support to pass.

item.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
item.description: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days." SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.

item.title: Xi pitches China as AI partner to developing world, warns against risks and security overreach
item.description: China will provide developing countries with 5,000 opportunities in AI training and seminar programs, as well as develop AI cooperation with various blocs.

item.title: Oil prices rise as U.S.-Iran hostilities threaten supply through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices rose Friday as investors weighed escalating threats between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
item.description: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.

item.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
item.description: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

item.title: Sweden's Saab posts record orders as fighter jet maker cashes in on higher defense spending
item.description: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

item.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
item.description: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.

item.title: India's biggest IPO this year rakes in bids worth $31 billion, powered by institutional frenzy
item.description: The IPO of India's largest asset manager closed on Thursday, drawing keen interest from institutional investors.

item.title: Buy the contractor before the renovation is complete: This stock's next growth phase is taking shape
item.description: The stock is trading near the low end of historical multiples despite improving fundamentals and catalysts ahead.

item.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
item.description: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

item.title: The best states for workers to get educated, trained and find a job in America in 2026
item.description: These 11 U.S. states excel when it comes to the education level of their workforce, migration patterns, and workforce development programs.

item.title: SoftBank sinks over 9% as Asia chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
item.description: The declines followed another weak session for U.S. technology stocks, with the Nasdaq Composite falling 1.47% as semiconductor shares came under renewed pressure.

item.title: How Morgan Stanley is positioning its income portfolio right now
item.description: Investors seeking income should diversify beyond the traditional 60/40, according to Morgan Stanley. Here is how its portfolio breaks down.

item.title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
item.description: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

item.title: Foreign investors sweeten on Indian government bonds as equities see a sell-off
item.description: The Indian government bond market is drawing interest from foreign investors as it readies for a likely inclusion in Bloomberg index.

item.title: Here's a rapid-fire update on our stock portfolio, including the 5 names to buy
item.description: Jim Cramer and Jeff Marks offered their latest thoughts on the Investing Club's portfolio during the July Monthly Meeting.

item.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
item.description: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.

item.title: Here's why the housing market is hurting so much this summer
item.description: Mortgage rates are high, home prices at record levels, and consumers stressed — all contributing to a drop in existing home sales and builder sentiment.

item.title: Alphabet shares fall on report its most powerful AI model Gemini 3.5 Pro is delayed
item.description: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the pullback in this aerospace giant is a buying opportunity
item.description: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said GE Aerospace's post-earnings sell-off overlooks another strong beat-and-raise quarter.

item.title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination
item.description: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.

item.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
item.description: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

item.title: 42% of adults rely on their parents for financial support—there are no 'bad guys' here, says financial therapist
item.description: Parents can maximize the impact of their support by ensuring their gifts alleviate financial stress or help their kids move closer to their long-term goals.

item.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.

item.title: As prediction markets boom, questions arise over who will be the watchdog
item.description: As new contract types are introduced, prediction markets may have to work under two regulatory bodies.
